title: Device Settings - List of supported settings vs UI headset spec
scenario: Verify that supported headset settings in Poly Studio Mobile app match the headset UI specification
steps: 1. Acquire the headset UI specification document for the tested Poly Bluetooth headset.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Review the full list of settings and features displayed in Device Settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications).
5. Compare each setting/feature in the app against the headset UI specification document.
6. Verify that all supported headset settings listed in the spec are present in the app.
expected: All supported headset settings from the headset UI specification are present in the Poly Studio Mobile app's Device Settings.
